problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: The key to What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified is mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression — specifically mRNA therapy to — which would help 17,000,000 people affected.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
